title: Earnings Preview for Blink Charging - Benzinga
text: Blink Charging Earnings Preview for Q3 2024. Earnings Date: November 7, 2024. Key Expectations: Analysts project Blink Charging will report an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.16 for the upcoming quarter. Recent Performance: The company missed previous EPS estimates by $0.03, which triggered a significant 15.48% stock price decline the following trading day. As of November 5, shares traded at $2.15, down 21.34% over the past 52 weeks. Analyst Insight: The announcement from Blink Charging is eagerly anticipated, with investors seeking news of surpassing estimates and favorable guidance for the next quarter. Guidance could be a critical factor influencing stock price movement following the release. Investor Sentiment: Long-term shareholders are likely entering this earnings announcement with a bearish outlook, given the negative year-to-date returns.
